subject: Re: 45A Bolongo Bay
body:
tell them 595 is final

----- Original Message ----
From: Darren indyke <dkiesq@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Saturday, March 10, 2007 8:56:25 AM
Subject: FW: 45A Bolongo Bay


Please advise

-----Original Message-----
From: ddac94@aol.com
To: dkiesq@aol.com
Sent: 3/10/2007 10:53 AM
Subject: 45A Bolongo Bay

Hi Darren,
Just heard from the Realtor; the seller isn't willing to counter offer on our last offer of $595,000; The other interested buyer is making their final offer and she would like our final offer so we can put both out on the table;this is coming from the realtor, this is not first hand knowledge.   
Let me know what's next and thanks again for everything,
Dave
